name: Fruit Punch (Young)
recipeIngredient: 1 package Sugar-free tropical punch flavored soft drink mix (.35 ounce)
12 ounces Orange juice concentrate (unsweetened, frozen and thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pitcher, combine the soft drink mix and water; stir until well mixed.
2. Add the orange juice concentrate and stir again.
3. When ready to serve, pour into a punch bowl and add the white soda.
4. Yield: 20 servings (5 quarts).
Diabetic Exchanges:
- One serving equals 1/2 fruit
- Also, 38 calories, 3 mg sodium, 0 cholesterol, 9 gm carbohydrate, trace protein, trace fat.
Source: Taste of Home, August/September 1993. Recipe by Kaitlin Young.
